text:
Every hash deserves a second chance.

We take dead mining rigs — written off, shelved, forgotten — and refab them into working machines.

No new silicon. No retail markup. Just salvage-grade parts, tested and tuned.

R-Series rigs. B-Series boost modules. X-Series experimental builds.

Junk is mispriced loot.

secondhash.io

#ClubHashCash #Hashathon #SecondHash @ClubHashcash
